title: Avoid duplicated string literals
description: Duplicated string literals make refactoring complex and error-prone because changes must be applied to multiple locations. This increases maintenance costs and the risk of inconsistencies when only some occurrences are updated.
recommendation: Extract repeated string literals into named constants or variables.

noncompliant.description: Repeated string literals make refactoring difficult and increase the risk of inconsistencies.

compliant.description: Extract repeated string literals into named constants or configuration structures for better maintainability.

checks.message: Duplicated string literal detected: Extract repeated strings into named constants to improve maintainability
